posts.author: ittaidayagi (Ittai Dayagi)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Add support to change writing direction of multi lines in monday docs.

What are you trying to achieve

I want to work with monday docs in Hebrew and sometimes need to change couple of lines to be in RTL writing direction
